name: Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) including predominantly inattentive, predominantly hyperactive, combined, and unspecified types. Used in ADHD follow-up care and medication management measures (ADD).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder, predominantly inattentive type
Attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder, predominantly hyperactive type
Other specified behavioral and emotional disorders with onset usually occurring in childhood and adolescence (includes attention-deficit disorder without hyperactivity)
